# Feature: Greeter

**Status:** Stable

## Summary

The greeter produces a greeting string for a given name.

## Problem

Callers need a consistent, localized greeting.

## Behavior

### Greeting format

#### REQ: greeting-prefix

A greeting MUST start with the word "Hello".

#### REQ: greeting-name

A greeting MUST include the supplied name.

## Dependencies

- clock

## Acceptance Criteria

Not defined yet.

## Open Questions

None at this time.
